Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove multiresource admission, rejection isolation, backpressure, abort propagation, and handle-clean drain; every external value remains unknown until runtime admission produces an owned value; then change one HTML repair, Cheerio mode, selector, unknown value, record schema, link relation, or metadata case and retain rejected evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify per-item failure without losing sibling settlements, aggregate cause, or crawl-level stop conditions.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Rejection Isolation model · Theory Rejection Iso…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Promise.all is always correct because it fails fast.
